examples.commit_message: Biocom: adjust CEN's to the MCU's needs Biocom: adjust CEN's to the MCU's needs Controls work!
examples.patch:
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ VIDEO_HEIGHT=224
 
 [mist|sidi]
 # Sound doesn't fit in small devices
-NOSOUND
+#NOSOUND
 OSD_NOBCK
 VIDEO_WIDTH=384
 JTFRAME_SCAN2X
examples.before_code:
[all]
CORENAME="JTBIOCOM"
GAMETOP=jtbiocom_game
BUTTONS=2
STEREO_GAME
COLORW=5
JTFRAME_MRA_DIP
JTFRAME_CLK24
VIDEO_HEIGHT=224

[mist|sidi]
# Sound doesn't fit in small devices
NOSOUND
OSD_NOBCK
VIDEO_WIDTH=384
JTFRAME_SCAN2X

[mister]
AVATARS
VIDEO_WIDTH=256
JTFRAME_OSD_NOLOAD
JTFRAME_ARX=5
JTFRAME_ARY=4
examples.after_code:
[all]
CORENAME="JTBIOCOM"
GAMETOP=jtbiocom_game
BUTTONS=2
STEREO_GAME
COLORW=5
JTFRAME_MRA_DIP
JTFRAME_CLK24
VIDEO_HEIGHT=224

[mist|sidi]
# Sound doesn't fit in small devices
#NOSOUND
OSD_NOBCK
VIDEO_WIDTH=384

[mister]
AVATARS
VIDEO_WIDTH=256
JTFRAME_OSD_NOLOAD

JTFRAME_ARY=4
